name: Well Life Nursing Care
desc: A full-stack appointment scheduling application with role-based authentication, availability management, and real-time appointment booking.

name: Icons by Heynendo
desc: A React-first icon library designed to give developers beautiful, customizable icons. This library can be installed through npm or icons can be copied and downloaded from the website.

name: Schedule System
desc: A full-stack appointment scheduling application with role-based authentication, availability management, and real-time appointment booking.

name: XCL Property Management
desc: Website for XCL Management showcasing their office properties across Orland Park, IL, with easy navigation for current and future tenants to explore locations and connect.

name: Rebie's Bakery
desc: Custom website for independent business Rebie's Bakery to display their creations, share the menu options, and connect with customers.

name: Git Repo Tracker
desc: A React website built for developers that takes a public git URL and visualizes all commits, branches, and details from the repo. Allows users to download commit details in their preferred data format.

name: HF Photography
desc: Portfolio site for freelance photographer Helayna Fuller to showcase her work and connect with prospective clients.
